title: T-017 — UI: RPT-002 Yield by Line + RPT-003 Yield by SKU pages (drill-down) (12-REPORTING §15.1 RPT-002/RPT-003)
prompt:
# T-017 — Yield by Line + Yield by SKU pages

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.1 RPT-002 + RPT-003, §4.1 #2 + #3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/catalog-screens.jsx:402-492 (`rpt_yield_by_line`)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/catalog-screens.jsx:496-617 (`rpt_yield_by_sku`)
UX: prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:264-305 (RPT-002), :306-342 (RPT-003)

## Goal
Two Server Component pages: `/reporting/yield-by-line` (per-line table w/ W/W change + sparkline + factory avg footer) and `/reporting/yield-by-sku` (per-SKU drill-down with expandable 13-week trend chart). Both consume mv_yield_by_line_week / mv_yield_by_sku_week (T-003); reuse cell components from T-016 (yield-cell, spark-line, grade-badge, variance-badge).

## Prototype parity
- RPT-002 source: `catalog-screens.jsx:402-492`; factoryAvg row pinned via TanStack Table row pinning or conditional className; Spark sparkline in last cell memoised.
- RPT-003 source: `catalog-screens.jsx:496-617`; expandable row lazy-loads 13-week trend via Server Action `getSkuTrend(skuCode, weekEnding)`; ChartLine → Recharts LineChart.
- All labels via next-intl `reporting.yield.*` keys.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-line/page.tsx` + client component reading mv_yield_by_line_week service helper; TanStack Table with sortable columns + factory avg pinned row.
2. `apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-sku/page.tsx` + client component reading mv_yield_by_sku_week; expandable row triggers Server Action for 13-week trend data.
3. Server Action `getSkuTrend(skuCode, weekEnding)` validates skuCode format server-side (alphanumeric + dash only, no injection) before constructing trend query.
4. Cross-module link 'View all runs in Production' → router.push('/production/work-orders?product=' + encodeURIComponent(code)).
5. Drill from RPT-002 row → RPT-003 with ?line= param.
6. Empty / loading / error / permission states; RTL + Playwright parity for both pages.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-line/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-line/_components/yield-by-line-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-line/__tests__/yield-by-line.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-sku/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-sku/_components/yield-by-sku-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-sku/_components/sku-trend-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/yield-by-sku/__tests__/yield-by-sku.test.tsx [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/get-sku-trend.ts [create]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-yield.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given mv_yield_by_line_week seeded with 6 lines for org_A, when /reporting/yield-by-line renders under org_A session, then table shows 6 rows + a factory-avg footer row pinned at bottom with bordered styling matching prototype line 462-475.
2. Given user clicks a line row, when navigation occurs, then router.push to /reporting/yield-by-sku?line=<line_id> and the SKU page filters accordingly.
3. Given an SKU row is expanded, when the expansion fires, then getSkuTrend Server Action is called (verified via network log) and returns 13-week data; ChartLine renders.
4. Given getSkuTrend is called with skuCode='<script>', when validated, then it rejects with InvalidSkuCodeError before any SQL is issued.
5. Given user without rpt.dashboard.view, when accessing either page, then middleware (T-009) 403s + audits.
6. Given UI parity policy, when closeout is reviewed, then Playwright trace + screenshot for BOTH pages attached; empty / loading / error / permission states tested.
7. All labels routed through next-intl `reporting.yield.*`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL for both pages asserting parity + factory-avg pinning + drill navigation + lazy trend load + skuCode injection guard; Playwright parity per prototype.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test yield-by-line yield-by-sku && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-yield`.
- GREEN: build pages + Server Action + chart.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not let skuCode reach SQL unvalidated.
- Do not load 13-week trend eagerly for all SKUs — lazy on expand.
- Do not skip @media print CSS on charts.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not skip empty/loading/error/permission states (UI parity policy).
- Do not bypass T-003 service helper (org+site filter).

pipeline_inputs.details: Consume mv_yield_by_line_week / mv_yield_by_sku_week. Reuse T-016 cell components. SkuCode injection guard server-side. Cross-module link to /production/work-orders.

Do not implement export modal here (T-026)
